command:
echo "=== BACKUP DB ==="
sudo -u git cp /home/jose/gitea/data/gitea/gitea.db /home/jose/gitea/data/gitea/gitea.db.pre-upgrade-backup
ls -lah /home/jose/gitea/data/gitea/gitea.db*

echo "=== DOWNLOAD GITEA 1.26.2 ==="
cd /tmp
curl -L -o gitea-1.26.2 https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/releases/download/v1.26.2/gitea-1.26.2-linux-amd64
ls -lah /tmp/gitea-1.26.2

echo "=== VERIFY DOWNLOAD ==="
/tmp/gitea-1.26.2 --version

echo "=== INSTALL ==="
sudo systemctl stop gitea
sudo cp /usr/local/bin/gitea /usr/local/bin/gitea.1.22.6.bak
sudo cp /tmp/gitea-1.26.2 /usr/local/bin/gitea
sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/gitea
/usr/local/bin/gitea --version

echo "=== START GITEA ==="
sudo systemctl start gitea
sleep 8
sudo systemctl status gitea --no-pager -l

echo "=== JOURNAL ==="
sudo journalctl -u gitea -n 30 --no-pager
